text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In front of a restaurant, a flag advertising a
special fair flutters in the wind.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Trainer... am I dreaming? What do you see written
on that flag?
choice_data_list: "Unlimited Mont Blanc buffet! Eat till you drop!"

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Is this not a dream?! Who did this?! Who thought
up this sinful fair?!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Ahh, I can smell the chestnut cream from here...
And it's 3 p.m., the time of day when a young
lady's heart may waver...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
There is no possible way for me to fight this
temptation.
choice_data_list:
This is a rare opportunity, so why fight it? I'll
join you.

This is a rare opportunity, so why fight it? I'll
join you.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
...Thank goodness. If you had told me to go
alone, well... I have little confidence I would have
been capable of self-restraint.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Now, what do you think I should do? I see an
incline of temptation rising before me, like the
slope of Nakayama.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Shall I run up it at full speed?
choice_data_list: Why not take a measured approach?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Ahem... Y-you are right, of course... Mont Blanc is
a dessert to be consumed with elegance and
dignity.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I shall eat in moderation. That's what I had in
mind to start with, for what it's worth. It is what's
proper.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: ...You're very cruel, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: No... Well, shall we?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Phew, that went well. My sweet tooth was sated
after the first plate. I managed to control myself.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
We'd best not approach this restaurant for a
while. Better safe than sorry, right?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro McQueen stops herself from eating too
much. Not overloading on sugar seems to have
helped her keep a clear head.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Are those your instructions?! I can't decide whether to shake your hand or slap you in the face.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Very well, I shall brace myself. Let's begin our
journey, to reach the other side of this slope.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Hic... What a magnificent, yet regrettable experience. On the one hand I'm satisfied, on the other, I'm plagued with guilt.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Was that a creak just now?! Trainer, please tell
me that came from your mouth.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Y-yes, surely that's the case. No matter how much
I may have eaten, it couldn't be so much that the
asphalt would creak beneath me.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I shall burn off what I ate through training. Now
to throw myself wholeheartedly into it!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Although we overindulge, Mejiro McQueen's
potential seems to grow in proportion to the
number of calories she consumes.
